---
name: Bug Report
about: Report broken links, incorrect information, or formatting issues
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What's Wrong

Describe the issue clearly. Include the file path and section if applicable.

## Expected Behavior

What should the content say or how should it render?

## Actual Behavior

What does it currently say or how does it currently render?

## Additional Context

- Link to the affected file (if applicable)
- Screenshot of rendering issue (if applicable)
